entity.label: Abda
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Adoniram, whom Solomon set over the tribute (1 Kings 4:6); i.e., the forced labour (R.V., “levy”).

nodes.label: Abda
nodes.description: The father of Adoniram, whom Solomon set over the tribute (1 Kings 4:6); i.e., the forced labour (R.V., “levy”).

nodes.label: Adoniram
nodes.description: One who was “over the tribute;” i.e., “over the levy.” He was stoned by the Israelites after they had revolted from Rehoboam (2 Chr. 10:18). Called also Adoram (2 Sam. 20:24) and Adoniram (1 Kings 4:6).

verses.text: And Ahishar was over the household: and Adoniram the son of Abda was over the tribute.
